name_cn:
Original Leather P【With full original green box packaging】
Premium Original Leather P【With full counter packaging】
Gucci Jackie Small Shoulder Bag
Crafted from top-quality leather, this brand-new Gucci Jackie series shoulder bag showcases the exquisite craftsmanship, crescent shape, and stylish design of the classic shoulder bag. The light gold-tone hardware, leather trim, and matching strap featuring red and green webbing combine to offer more styling possibilities for this Gucci Jackie Small Shoulder Bag in black patent leather.
Model: 782849
Color: Black Patent Leather
Size: 27.5x19x4cm
